mapper.sql: SELECT l.log_id, l.material_id, m.material_code, m.material_name, l.warehouse_id, w.warehouse_name, l.location_id, loc.warehouse_code as location_code, loc.warehouse_name as location_name, a.warehouse_name as area_name, l.batch_no, l.change_type, l.change_qty, l.before_qty, l.after_qty, l.ref_order_type, l.ref_order_no, l.create_by, l.create_time, l.remark FROM wms_inventory_log l LEFT JOIN wms_material m ON l.material_id = m.material_id LEFT JOIN wms_warehouse w ON l.warehouse_id = w.warehouse_id LEFT JOIN wms_warehouse loc ON l.location_id = loc.warehouse_id LEFT JOIN wms_warehouse a ON loc.parent_id = a.warehouse_id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO wms_inventory_log (material_id, warehouse_id, location_id, batch_no, change_type, change_qty, before_qty, after_qty, ref_order_type, ref_order_no, create_by, create_time, remark) VALUES (#{materialId}, #{warehouseId}, #{locationId}, #{batchNo}, #{changeType}, #{changeQty}, #{beforeQty}, #{afterQty}, #{refOrderType}, #{refOrderNo}, #{createBy}, sysdate(), #{remark})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM wms_inventory_log WHERE log_id IN #{logId}
